name: Architext 1.6.2 Honest Routing Progress
summary: Patch release that replaces the static route-planning spinner with honest live progress (phase labels, edge counts, routes-considered counter, elapsed clock) and repairs the roadmap release reference that broke deep validation.
updateSource: 1.6.2 RC: progress work merged (PR #101); maintainer directive 2026-06-11 — point release now, separation-pass optimization next (1.6.3), 1.7.0 gated behind the patch stream.

required.title: Live route-planning progress
required.summary: Dense flows sat on a static 'Routing edges' spinner for 1-2 minutes, indistinguishable from a hang. The planner now reports real progress — per-edge completion counts, a routes-considered counter ticked from inside candidate generation (120ms throttle), force-emitting phase labels including the two previously silent passes (Tidying endpoint mounts, Separating parallel runs) — forwarded by the planning worker and rendered in the loading overlay with an elapsed-seconds clock.

required.title: Repair roadmap release reference
required.summary: The Go-rewrite roadmap item referenced targetReleaseId v1-7-0 before that release exists; the deep validator (npm run validate, doctor, sync migration test) was red on main. The version decision stays in the item summary; the id is set when the release is created at kickoff.

workstreams.name: Patch corrections
workstreams.summary: Patch release that replaces the static route-planning spinner with honest live progress (phase labels, edge counts, routes-considered counter, elapsed clock) and repairs the roadmap release reference that broke deep validation.
